prompt: Anforderungen fuer einen Schnellfilter: Benutzer koennen Knoten nach Label filtern, Textfeld in der Toolbar, beim Tippen werden nicht-matchende Knoten ausgegraut, bei leerem Filter alle normal. Erstelle Feature Files mit hoher Qualitaet.

assertions.name: skill_triggered
assertions.text: The feature-design skill was invoked via the Skill tool

assertions.name: declarative_not_imperative
assertions.text: Scenarios describe behavior declaratively, not imperatively

assertions.name: empty_filter_scenario
assertions.text: A scenario for empty filter (all nodes visible) exists

assertions.name: partial_match_scenario
assertions.text: A scenario for partial text matching exists

assertions.name: no_match_scenario
assertions.text: A scenario for no matching nodes exists

assertions.name: domain_language
assertions.text: Scenarios use domain language (Knoten, Label, Filter) not technical jargon

assertions.name: quality_review_happened
assertions.text: A quality review of the feature files was performed
